content.text: [ { "scene_id": 1, "timestamp_start": "00:00:00", "timestamp_end": "00:02:30", "location": "Bus terminal entrance", "scene_text": "Arun stands near the terminal doors, watching buses arrive and leave. He checks his phone repeatedly, then puts it away without unlocking it." }, { "scene_id": 2, "timestamp_start": "00:02:30", "timestamp_end": "00:05:00", "location": "Bus terminal waiting area", "scene_text": "Nisha enters the terminal and spots Arun. She hesitates before walking toward him. Arun notices her only when she stops in front of him." }, { "scene_id": 3, "timestamp_start": "00:05:00", "timestamp_end": "00:07:30", "location": "Waiting bench", "scene_text": "They sit on the same bench with space between them. Nisha asks when he decided to leave. Arun answers quietly that he decided a long time ago." }, { "scene_id": 4, "timestamp_start": "00:07:30", "timestamp_end": "00:10:00", "location": "Coffee stall", "scene_text": "Arun brings two cups of coffee. Nisha drinks and grimaces. They share a brief smile, remembering how bad the coffee has always been." }, { "scene_id": 5, "timestamp_start": "00:10:00", "timestamp_end": "00:12:30", "location": "Terminal corridor", "scene_text": "An announcement echoes through the terminal. Nisha mentions how they once planned to leave together. Arun listens but does not respond immediately." }, { "scene_id": 6, "timestamp_start": "00:12:30", "timestamp_end": "00:15:00", "location": "Window side seating", "scene_text": "Sunlight grows stronger through the glass. Arun admits that staying made him feel invisible. Nisha looks away, hurt but understanding." }, { "scene_id": 7, "timestamp_start": "00:15:00", "timestamp_end": "00:17:30", "location": "Waiting area", "scene_text": "People begin lining up for boarding. Nisha asks why he never said any of this before. Arun says he was afraid of being honest." }, { "scene_id": 8, "timestamp_start": "00:17:30", "timestamp_end": "00:19:30", "location": "Near ticket counter", "scene_text": "Nisha explains that silence hurt more than truth ever could. Arun nods, accepting the weight of her words." }, { "scene_id": 9, "timestamp_start": "00:19:30", "timestamp_end": "00:21:30", "location": "Seating area", "scene_text": "Nisha hands Arun a folded letter she never sent. Arun holds it without opening, unsure if he deserves to read it." }, { "scene_id": 10, "timestamp_start": "00:21:30", "timestamp_end": "00:23:30", "location": "Seating area", "scene_text": "Arun reads the letter silently. His expression changes as he realizes how clearly Nisha understood him even when he stayed silent." }, { "scene_id": 11, "timestamp_start": "00:23:30", "timestamp_end": "00:25:30", "location": "Boarding gate", "scene_text": "Passengers begin boarding. Arun tells Nisha he does not expect her to wait for him. She replies that she is done waiting." }, { "scene_id": 12, "timestamp_start": "00:25:30", "timestamp_end": "00:27:30", "location": "Gate entrance", "scene_text": "Arun hesitates, as if wanting to

say more. Nisha stops him gently, asking him not to make promises he cannot keep." }, { "scene_id": 13, "timestamp_start": "00:27:30", "timestamp_end": "00:29:30", "location": "Gate entrance", "scene_text": "They share a quiet moment. Arun thanks Nisha for being honest. She thanks him for finally being clear." }, { "scene_id": 14, "timestamp_start": "00:29:30", "timestamp_end": "00:31:30", "location": "Inside bus", "scene_text": "Arun sits by the window. He looks out and sees Nisha standing still, watching without waving." }, { "scene_id": 15, "timestamp_start": "00:31:30", "timestamp_end": "00:33:00", "location": "Bus terminal exterior", "scene_text": "The bus drives away. Nisha remains where she is, breathing deeply as the terminal returns to its usual quiet." } ]
